prompt:
You are the GREEN TEAM for a controlled Foundry live smoke.

Implement from the NLSpec How section only. You may see outcome labels, but not test code, assertions, raw failure output, or Done criteria.

NLSpec How section: trim surrounding whitespace; lowercase ASCII letters; keep ASCII digits; treat ASCII whitespace and ASCII punctuation as separators; collapse repeated separators into one hyphen; strip leading and trailing hyphens; return "untitled" when no ASCII letters or digits remain

Test results:
  slugify_ascii_words: PASS
  slugify_unicode_transliteration: FAIL

## Task
Return JSON only with this shape:
{
  "green_implementation_plan": ["step", "step"],
  "likely_next_attempt": "string"
}
Use only the How section and PASS/FAIL labels above.

visible_context.label: nlspec_how
visible_context.content: trim surrounding whitespace; lowercase ASCII letters; keep ASCII digits; treat ASCII whitespace and ASCII punctuation as separators; collapse repeated separators into one hyphen; strip leading and trailing hyphens; return "untitled" when no ASCII letters or digits remain

withheld_context.label: nlspec_done
samples: Done: accented Latin letters transliterate with diacritics removed
